languages.text: {n}На мостике раздаются удивленные возгласы. Когда вы отрываетесь от созерцания последствий залпа и бросаете взгляд на ауспексы, вы видите: пирамида, считанные минуты назад расколотая на куски, вновь становится единым целым. Непохоже, чтобы прямое попадание мельта-торпеды хоть как-то ей навредило.{/n}

{n}Exclamations of surprise fill the bridge. When you take a break from contemplating the aftermath of the salvo and glance at the auspexes, you see that the pyramid, which was split into pieces a few minutes ago, is becoming whole again. It does not appear that the direct hit from the melta-torpedo did it any harm at all.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}На мостике раздаются удивленные возгласы. Когда вы отрываетесь от созерцания последствий залпа и бросаете взгляд на ауспексы, вы видите: пирамида, считанные минуты назад расколотая на куски, вновь становится единым целым. Непохоже, чтобы прямое попадание мельта-торпеды хоть как-то ей навредило.{/n}

When you take a break from contemplating the aftermath of the salvo and glance at the auspexes, you see that the pyramid, which was split into pieces a few minutes ago, is becoming whole again. It does not appear that the direct hit from the melta-torpedo did it any harm at all.{/n}

When you take a break from contemplating the aftermath of the salvo and glance at the auspexes, you see that the pyramid, which was split into pieces a few minutes ago, is becoming whole again. It does not appear that the direct hit from the melta-torpedo did it any harm at all.{/n}

{n}Exclamations of surprise fill the bridge. When you take a break from contemplating the aftermath of the salvo and glance at the auspexes, you see that the pyramid, which was split into pieces a few minutes ago, is becoming whole again. It does not appear that the direct hit from the melta-torpedo did it any harm at all.{/n}

languages.text: 橋の上には驚きの声が響き渡る。砲撃の余波を考えながら休憩を取って、周囲を見渡すと、数分前にバラバラになったピラミッドが、再び一体化しつつある。溶断魚雷の直撃でダメージを受けたようには見えない。
languages.original_text: {n}Exclamations of surprise fill the bridge. When you take a break from contemplating the aftermath of the salvo and glance at the auspexes, you see that the pyramid, which was split into pieces a few minutes ago, is becoming whole again. It does not appear that the direct hit from the melta-torpedo did it any harm at all.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 橋の上には驚きの声が響き渡る。砲撃の余波を考えながら休憩を取って、周囲を見渡すと、数分前にバラバラになったピラミッドが、再び一体化しつつある。溶断魚雷の直撃でダメージを受けたようには見えない。

languages.text: {n}El puente se llena de exclamaciones de asombro. Cuando apartas la mirada de la andanada y miras a los auspexes, ves que la pirámide, hecha pedazos hace unos instantes, está prácticamente intacta otra vez. No parece que tu torpedo de fusión haya hecho daño alguno.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Exclamations of surprise fill the bridge. When you take a break from contemplating the aftermath of the salvo and glance at the auspexes, you see that the pyramid, which was split into pieces a few minutes ago, is becoming whole again. It does not appear that the direct hit from the melta-torpedo did it any harm at all.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El puente se llena de exclamaciones de asombro. Cuando apartas la mirada de la andanada y miras a los auspexes, ves que la pirámide, hecha pedazos hace unos instantes, está prácticamente intacta otra vez. No parece que tu torpedo de fusión haya hecho daño alguno.{/n}

languages.text: {n}舰桥上响起一片惊愕的低呼。你刚从评估齐射战果的沉思中回神，余光瞥见鸟卜仪屏幕：那座几分钟前被炸成碎片的金字塔正在自行重组复原。看来，热熔鱼雷的直接命中根本没伤到它分毫。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Exclamations of surprise fill the bridge. When you take a break from contemplating the aftermath of the salvo and glance at the auspexes, you see that the pyramid, which was split into pieces a few minutes ago, is becoming whole again. It does not appear that the direct hit from the melta-torpedo did it any harm at all.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}舰桥上响起一片惊愕的低呼。你刚从评估齐射战果的沉思中回神，余光瞥见鸟卜仪屏幕：那座几分钟前被炸成碎片的金字塔正在自行重组复原。看来，热熔鱼雷的直接命中根本没伤到它分毫。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Auf der Brücke ertönen überraschte Rufe. Als du dich von den Folgen der Salve abwendest und einen Blick auf die Auspizien wirfst, siehst du, dass die gerade noch völlig zerstörte Pyramide wieder intakt ist. Der direkte Treffer des Meltertorpedos scheint ihr keinerlei Schaden zugefügt zu haben.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Exclamations of surprise fill the bridge. When you take a break from contemplating the aftermath of the salvo and glance at the auspexes, you see that the pyramid, which was split into pieces a few minutes ago, is becoming whole again. It does not appear that the direct hit from the melta-torpedo did it any harm at all.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Auf der Brücke ertönen überraschte Rufe. Als du dich von den Folgen der Salve abwendest und einen Blick auf die Auspizien wirfst, siehst du, dass die gerade noch völlig zerstörte Pyramide wieder intakt ist. Der direkte Treffer des Meltertorpedos scheint ihr keinerlei Schaden zugefügt zu haben.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Şaşkınlık nidaları köprüyü dolduruyor. Salvonun sonrasını düşünmeye bir ara verip alametlere göz attığında birkaç dakika önce parçalara ayrılan piramidin tekrar bütün hâline geldiğini görüyorsun. Melta torpidosundan yapılan doğrudan isabetin ona hiç zarar vermediği anlaşılıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Exclamations of surprise fill the bridge. When you take a break from contemplating the aftermath of the salvo and glance at the auspexes, you see that the pyramid, which was split into pieces a few minutes ago, is becoming whole again. It does not appear that the direct hit from the melta-torpedo did it any harm at all.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Şaşkınlık nidaları köprüyü dolduruyor. Salvonun sonrasını düşünmeye bir ara verip alametlere göz attığında birkaç dakika önce parçalara ayrılan piramidin tekrar bütün hâline geldiğini görüyorsun. Melta torpidosundan yapılan doğrudan isabetin ona hiç zarar vermediği anlaşılıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La passerelle bourdonne d'exclamations de surprise. Quand enfin vous détachez vos yeux des conséquences de la salve et que vous jetez un coup d'œil aux auspex, vous constatez que la pyramide, réduite en miettes il y a quelques minutes, est en train de se reconstituer, comme si la frappe directe de la torpille ne l'avait jamais endommagée.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Exclamations of surprise fill the bridge. It does not appear that the direct hit from the melta-torpedo did it any harm at all.{/n}
